parts.text: I’d like to check the status of my auto-pay setup for my monthly invoice.
Please enroll me in preauthorized billing for my account.
I want to set up automatic payments and ensure the discount is applied.
Can you help me switch my auto pay from one card to another?
I need assistance managing my recurring payments.
I’d like to confirm the date of my next automatic payment.
Can you set up auto pay for my account so I never miss a payment?
I want to remove my credit card from automatic payments.
Please help me add a new payment method for recurring payments.
I’d like to update my auto pay settings to a different payment method.
Can you verify that my automatic payment is processing
correctly
I want to enroll in auto pay for my account immediately.
I have a question about my automatic payments and billing schedule.
Please set up auto pay for my monthly service charges.
I want to modify the credit card linked to my auto-pay account.
I need to make an automatic payment on my credit card.
Can you apply the automatic payment discount to my account?
I want to enable automatic bill pay for all future invoices.
I’d like to confirm that my recurring payment is active.
Can you help me set up preauthorized payments for my account?
I need to cancel my automatic payment for
this month
Please update the auto billing information on my account.
I want to add my credit card for recurring monthly payments.
Can you help me enroll in auto pay using my credit card?
I’d like to set up automatic payments for my account.
